rows.label: tev015801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Beats about the
duties of a Companion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Beats if he's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Beats about Miran weather.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Beats about Union rewards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Beats if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Beats about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Companion are like the handymen of
NLA. The city residents come to us
with every little problem they have.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0002
rows.name:
We get people coming up to us with all
sorts of complicated requests that
aren't ever posted at Quest Board.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0003
rows.name:
But I bet you know exactly what I'm talking
about. You've got the sort of vibe where I bet
folks just walk up to you asking for help.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0004
rows.name:
And when they do, I hope you hear 'em
out. Because every time that happens,
it makes our job a little bit easier.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0005
rows.name:
You got that? You gotta do what
you can to help. For the people,
and for the future of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0008
rows.name:
You know what they call that
unfinished road up ahead? It's
the "Long Road to Hell."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0009
rows.name:
That's because in the dead of night, drunks
and clumsy folk walk right off the edge and
tumble down to the lower level of the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Fortunately there's that shock-absorbing
gel stuff down below, so it's not
like they die or anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0011
rows.name:
But once you fall, the only way to get back
here is to clamber up one of those red pipes,
then climb a really long emergency staircase.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0012
rows.name:
The fall may not kill you, but
the way back sure sucks. No
wonder they call it hell![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0017
rows.name:
Outside of the city, a change
in weather could mean the
difference between life and death.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0018
rows.name:
Rain obstructs your visibility, making
it hard to hit indigens with gunfire.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0019
rows.name:
I've even heard that some places literally
rain fire and brimstone. You could end up being
critically injured just by walking around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0020
rows.name:
If the weather takes a turn for the
dangerous, one way to survive is to go
hide in a cave or something like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0021
rows.name:
You gotta pay attention to any changes
in your environment if you want to
survive on this harsh world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0027
rows.name:
The money and supplies given
to a Union are divided among
their members as rewards.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0028
rows.name:
The more active the Union, the more
money and items it gets to distribute.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0029
rows.name:
I had to front pretty much every penny I
had to my brother Dart so he could salvage
his Doll, and now I'm flat broke.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG0030
rows.name:
So it would be great if you could really
step things up with your Companion work.
...Please, man. I need to get paid here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG1001
rows.name:
I saw a bunch of Bias dancing some
weird dance the other day, so I
demanded they explain themselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG1002
rows.name:
Then they got mad at ME and
told me not to interrupt their
"Dance of Earthly Tribute."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG1003
rows.name:
I don't care how important it is to their culture
or whatever. If they do some crazy dance at a
place like this, folks are gonna freak out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG1004
rows.name:
I wish I could make them see
that, but I'll never be able
to explain it to them now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG1005
rows.name:
We've been having more and more of
these sorts of problems since the
xenoforms started coming here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG1010
rows.name:
Those Bias are going to
live with us in the city![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG1011
rows.name:
I know the Dance of Earthly
Tribute seems a little dubious,
but it's not our place to judge.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG1012
rows.name:
In fact, I figured I'd try moving to
its rhythm just once to see what it
was like. And you know what...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG1013
rows.name:
It's INCREDIBLE! Lately, I've just
been casting my duties aside and
dancing with the Bias till dawn![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev015801_MSG1014
rows.name:
You gotta try it. ...No, really! Come on!
Let's go bust some moves, Bias style![ST:wait ]
